历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science in Sichuan were approximately 43267 → 43982 → 52970 → 89512, showing a clear backward trend. Especially in 2025, due to the reform of the examination model (Science → Physics Category) and the widening score gap between major groups, the minimum ranking significantly dropped to about 89512. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 89512. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Sichuan was 88 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 109 in 2024, 112 in 2025, and 140 in 2026, an increase of about 25% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list is about 120th (2026), stable around 120th in recent years, making it a mid-tier 211 institution. The university is not included in reputation data, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events. Its Douyin heat ranking is 95th, rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms. There are no records of admission line breaks or crashes, and overall application heat is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment plan, which has some appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social heat, with 2025 admission rankings around 27000–35000, attracting high-scoring students. The total number of students taking the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is about 535,000, with an estimated 329,000 in Physics Category based on historical proportions, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 284,789 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Sichuan, which somewhat suppresses the willingness of Sichuan students to apply. In 2025, the university enrolled 129 students in Sichuan, accounting for about 2.31% of its total national enrollment of 5,575, a relatively low proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 89,512, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 25% theoretically shifts the ranking back by about 13,427 to 102,939, but the 15.5% increase in Sichuan Physics Category students partially offsets the expansion effect. The university's reputation is stable, Douyin heat is average, and the geographical distance is far, with no clear signs of increased application heat. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 101,939, with a range of 101,439–102,439.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 101,439–102,439, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 101,000), you can focus on aiming for popular majors like Veterinary Medicine Top Talent Training Class and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (after 102,000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university's Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline, making related majors cost-effective and worth considering.

学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. 专业热度与地域.text: History category majors are mainly in economics/management and languages.
